case_title: PRUDENTIAL OVERALL SUPPLY A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS SHANGRILA EXPRESS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHANGRILA EXPRESS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRUDENTIAL OVERALL SUPPLY A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHANGRILA EXPRESS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION. $2,540.84 PRINCIPAL, $64.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.34 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SHANGRILA EXPRESS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SHANGRILA EXPRESS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION. HEARING SET FOR APR-04-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STAY OF EXECUTION ON WRIT ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO: SHANGRILA EXPRESS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION.
